opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My right ear is burning hot, completely swollen, and the pain is so intense I can't even rest my head on a pillow. I think I have a severe infection.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight over a few hours and it's getting worse — I'm scared it's a serious infection that could spread to my brain, or that my ear will be permanently deformed.

symptom_narrative.character: burning hot, intensely painful, swollen ear; the firm upper part of the ear is the worst
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so intense I can't lie on that side or rest my head on a pillow, and I can't sleep
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my right ear, mostly the upper firm part; it feels swollen and hot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started tonight, getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; keeping pressure off it helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any touch or lying on that side
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: none that I've noticed — no discharge, no fever that I know of, my hearing seems normal
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had my ear cartilage flare up and get inflamed like this once or twice before, but never quite this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm exhausted and can't sleep because of the pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've had episodes of my ear cartilage getting inflamed before
past_medical_history.how_managed: they settled down on their own or with anti-inflammatories

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, independent, no safety concerns at home

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: the upper, firmer part of my right ear looks bright red and puffy and swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held camera, lighting and angle limited
